top_trades.reason: Largest premium trade at $2.7M with 313 contracts on deeply ITM calls (46% ITM) expiring March 2026. This represents strong bullish conviction with significant capital deployment, likely a protective long stock position or bullish spread given the deep ITM nature. The tight bid-ask spread ($1.60) indicates high liquidity and institutional participation.

Second-largest premium at $2.54M on deeply ITM TSLA calls (40% ITM) with March 2026 expiration. The 154-contract size combined with deep ITM positioning suggests either hedging activity or leveraged bullish exposure with minimal extrinsic value decay. Tight $2.25 spread shows strong liquidity.

Massive $2M bearish bet on MSFT puts that are extremely deep ITM (83% ITM), implying either protective puts on a large long position or a synthetic short. At $740 strike versus $404 current price, this represents significant downside protection or bearish conviction through March 2026 with high delta exposure.

Large 240-contract position worth $1.6M on AAPL calls 25% ITM expiring just days away (March 11, 2026). The short-dated nature with substantial ITM positioning suggests gamma scalping or final positioning before expiration, with the size indicating strong near-term directional conviction.

Significant $1.67M bullish META position on calls 23.5% ITM with March 2026 expiration. Unlike other deep ITM trades, this is closer to ATM suggesting directional bullish intent rather than hedging. The 107-contract size and tight $2.85 spread indicate strong conviction that META will maintain or exceed current levels.
